rows.label: tlk47100041_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Cole-san is such a kind soul~
Many war orphans are
sheltered at the theater.

rows.label: tlk47100041_04_msg0002
rows.name:
They've done that since
the theater first opened,
so some actors may be former orphans~

rows.label: tlk47100041_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Cole-san treats Ion
like a real granddaughter too~

rows.label: tlk47100041_04_msg0004
rows.name:
Now he's spoiled her so much,
he even lets Ion direct the stage.

rows.label: tlk47100041_04_msg0005
rows.name:
Even that strict old man
couldn't beat granddaughter power.
